title: Describing Your Environment
learningGoal: The learner will write 4 complex sentences describing the state of a room, applying negative adjectives and positional nouns with correct existence verbs.
instructions: Write four sentences in Japanese based on the prompts to describe a room. Make sure to choose 'Arimasu' for inanimate objects and 'Imasu' for living things. Pay attention to how you make a na-adjective negative.

contentItems.text: The particle 'ga' is used to mark WHAT exists. Example: Neko ga imasu.

writingPrompt: Translate: 1) This room is big. 2) It is not quiet. 3) Inside the room, there is a desk. 4) On top of the desk, there is a cat.
promptGoal: To construct descriptive sentences combining i-adjectives, negative na-adjectives, inanimate existence, and animate existence with spatial locations.

modelExampleOutputs.targetText: この へやは おおきいです。しずかじゃありません。へやの なかに つくえが あります。つくえの うえに ねこが います。
modelExampleOutputs.transliteration: Kono heya wa ookii desu. Shizuka ja arimasen. Heya no naka ni tsukue ga arimasu. Tsukue no ue ni neko ga imasu.
modelExampleOutputs.baseTranslation: This room is big. It is not quiet. Inside the room, there is a desk. On top of the desk, there is a cat.
modelExampleOutputs.annotation: Perfect translation. Correctly made the na-adjective negative, and properly switched between arimasu and imasu.

evaluationCriteria.description: Did the learner write 'Shizuka ja arimasen'?
Did the learner use 'no [Position] ni'? (e.g. Heya no naka ni, Tsukue no ue ni)
Did the learner use 'arimasu' for the desk and 'imasu' for the cat?
Did the learner use 'ga' before the existence verbs?

adminCorrectAnswerSet.sampleAnswer: この へやは おおきいです。しずかじゃありません。へやの なかに つくえが あります。つくえの うえに ねこが います。
acceptableAlternates: この へやは おおきいです。この へやは しずかじゃありません。へやの なかに つくえが あります。つくえの うえに ねこが います。
requiredKeywords: しずかじゃありません
adminCorrectAnswerSet.grammarBaseline: Adjective conjugation and positional existence formulas.

feedbackRules.onPass: Fantastic writing! You easily handled the complex positional phrases and existence rules.
feedbackRules.onFail: Review the existence verbs. Arimasu is for non-living things (desks). Imasu is for living things (cats).
feedbackRules.onPartial: Good try! Make sure you didn't say 'Shizukaku arimasen'. 'Shizuka' is a na-adjective, so its negative is 'ja arimasen'.

hintText: To say 'Inside the room', use 'Heya no naka ni'.
